sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103189" key="terpo/tramis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τερπότραμις</orth>, <sense id="n103189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἡ τῶν ἀφροδισίων τέρψις</ref> </xr> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0510.tlg001:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telecl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">66</biblScope> </bibl>; expld. by Meineke as <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁ τοῖς ἀφροδισίοις τερπόμενος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
